diagrams.title: Installation Lifecycle Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the sequential phases from site preparation through Go-Live with feedback loops
diagrams.purpose: Helps visualize the systematic approach required for successful IT installation and understand dependencies between phases

diagrams.title: FAT vs SAT Comparison Diagram
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of Factory Acceptance Testing and Site Acceptance Testing
diagrams.purpose: Clarifies the distinction between different acceptance testing phases and their roles in quality assurance

diagrams.title: Parallel Running Timeline
diagrams.description: Temporal representation showing overlap between old and new systems during transition period
diagrams.purpose: Illustrates the concept of parallel running and how it provides risk mitigation during system transitions

diagrams.title: Post-Installation Monitoring Components
diagrams.description: Shows key aspects monitored after installation to establish baselines
diagrams.purpose: Identifies what metrics should be tracked post-installation to support capacity planning and detect issues early
